epics.title: Expose 기억의 습작 in the songs library

tasks.title: Add a provisional song entry derived from the current lead-sheet extraction
acceptance_criteria: The songs library contains a visible entry for 기억의 습작.
The existing score viewer can open the new chart without UI changes.
Visible uncertainty from the extraction run is preserved in chart notes or cues rather than hidden.
done_definition: Song data compiles cleanly and renders inside the existing songs workspace.

assumptions: A provisional seed inside the existing songs dataset is acceptable before the full lead-sheet publish/import path exists.
The current viewer can render combined chord strings as plain text without additional formatting work.
risks: Unverified chord splits or jump directives may be mistaken for final chart data if draft status is not communicated clearly.
This seed path is manual and will need replacement once lead-sheet publishing is implemented.
